'''Koll''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Qwohog (species)|Qwohog]] who served as a medical technician for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

He had a sister, [[Kei No Kay]], who was a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] of the [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] [[Jund Voon]].
